untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'consecutive directional days' (5+ consecutive up/down days) and 'sentiment index percentile' with 20-percentile-point divergence thresholds. Neither 'consecutive day counting' nor 'sentiment index' are available in the allowed indicator list. The logic requires historical sequence analysis and external sentiment data not present in price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is primarily a regime confirmation and position management rule rather than a mechanical entry/exit system. It requires: (1) counting consecutive bars with same direction, (2) accessing an external sentiment index not in the allowed indicators, and (3) tracking divergence between sentiment and price direction over multiple periods. The rule is fundamentally untranslatable without sentiment indicator data. A partial approximation using directional price movement is shown but does not capture the core sentiment confirmation requirement.
